title: habenaria flexa
intro: Habenaria flexa, also known as the slender yellow orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to various parts of Asia, including India, China, and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Habenaria flexa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In terms of herbal preparations, Habenaria flexa is typically consumed as a decoction or powder, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment for topical applications.
